summary.en: Shasqi develops cancer therapies that use click chemistry to activate drugs directly at the tumor.
summary.zh: Shasqi 運用點擊化學技術,開發能在腫瘤部位直接活化藥物的癌症療法。

highlight.en: Its CAPAC platform places a click-chemistry reagent in the tumor that activates a systemic protodrug only on contact, keeping body-wide exposure safe.
highlight.zh: 其 CAPAC 平台將點擊化學試劑置於腫瘤,僅在接觸時才活化全身性前驅藥物,使全身暴露量維持在毒性閾值以下。

summary.en: Underground Cellar was a wine e-commerce site that gamified buying with surprise bottle upgrades.
summary.zh: Underground Cellar 是一個葡萄酒電商網站,以隨機升級酒款的方式將購買過程遊戲化。

highlight.en: Instead of discounts, it rewarded buyers with random bottle upgrades, giving value to shoppers while letting sellers move stock without eroding their brand.
highlight.zh: 它不採用折扣,而是以隨機升級酒款回饋買家,既讓消費者獲得價值,也讓賣家在不損害品牌的情況下清庫存。

summary.en: SigOpt was an optimization-as-a-service platform that tuned research pipelines in place.
summary.zh: SigOpt 是一個最佳化即服務平台,可就地調校研究流程。

highlight.en: Its cloud ensemble of optimization algorithms tuned models without rewriting pipelines, and was used in insurance, credit cards, algorithmic trading, and CPG.
highlight.zh: 其雲端最佳化演算法集合可在不重寫流程下調校模型,並應用於保險、信用卡、演算法交易與消費性包裝商品。

summary.en: Makrwatch helps D2C brands acquire users by running sponsored campaigns with YouTube creators.
summary.zh: Makrwatch 透過 YouTube 創作者的贊助活動,協助 D2C 品牌取得新用戶。

highlight.en: Positioned as an alternative to Google and Facebook ads, it reaches audiences at a lower cost per acquisition and works with creators in over 60 countries.
highlight.zh: 它定位為 Google 與 Facebook 廣告之外的替代管道,以更低的單次取得成本觸及受眾,並與超過 60 個國家的創作者合作。

summary.en: X-Zell builds rare-cell detection technology for early, pain-free cancer screening.
summary.zh: X-Zell 開發稀有細胞檢測技術,用於早期且無痛的癌症篩檢。

highlight.en: Its platform isolates and visualizes rare abnormal cells like Circulating Endothelial Cells using four in-house modules from blood processing to reporting.
highlight.zh: 其平台運用涵蓋血液處理到報告的四個自有模組,分離並視覺化如循環內皮細胞等稀有異常細胞。

summary.en: Zenflow makes a small implant that relieves urinary symptoms from enlarged prostate (BPH).
summary.zh: Zenflow 製造一款小型植入物,可緩解攝護腺肥大(BPH)引起的排尿症狀。

highlight.en: The Zenflow Spring is placed in a simple in-office procedure for lasting relief, avoiding the high sexual side-effect risk of BPH surgery.
highlight.zh: Zenflow Spring 透過簡單門診手術置入,提供持久緩解,避開 BPH 手術的高性功能副作用風險與藥物療效有限的問題。

summary.en: Smarking digitizes parking with analytics and dynamic pricing for the $655B parking industry.
summary.zh: Smarking 以分析與動態定價將停車數位化,服務規模達 6,550 億美元的停車產業。

highlight.en: Backed by YC and Khosla, it reached 2,500+ parking locations and launched the industry's first automatic dynamic pricing engine, lifting online revenue sharply.
highlight.zh: 在 YC 與 Khosla 支持下,它涵蓋逾 2,500 個停車地點,並推出業界首個全自動動態定價引擎,使線上營收提升 40% 至 400%。

summary.en: Yhat was an end-to-end data science lifecycle management platform, acquired by Alteryx.
summary.zh: Yhat 是一個端到端的資料科學生命週期管理平台,後被 Alteryx 收購。

highlight.en: The platform covered the full data science workflow from model building to deployment, and was acquired by NYSE-listed Alteryx (AYX).
highlight.zh: 該平台涵蓋從模型建構到部署的完整資料科學流程,並被在紐約證交所掛牌的 Alteryx(AYX)收購。

summary.en: NexTravel was a centralized corporate travel booking platform for companies.
summary.zh: NexTravel 是一個為企業打造的集中式商務旅行預訂平台。

highlight.en: It gave companies access to negotiated corporate and group rates for hotels and cars, streamlining travel booking and making it more cost-effective.
highlight.zh: 它讓企業取得協議好的公司與團體飯店、租車優惠價,簡化旅行預訂並降低成本。

summary.en: SIRUM is a nonprofit that redistributes unused medicine to clinics serving underserved patients.
summary.zh: SIRUM 是一個非營利組織,將未使用的藥品重新分配給服務弱勢患者的診所。

highlight.en: Incubated at Stanford, it acts like a match.com for surplus medicine, connecting donors with safety-net clinics and advising on redistribution programs.
highlight.zh: 它孵化於史丹佛,如同剩餘藥品的「配對平台」,串連捐贈者與安全網診所,並協助政府建立藥品再分配計畫。

summary.en: Meadow builds point-of-sale and compliance software for legal cannabis dispensaries.
summary.zh: Meadow 為合法大麻藥房打造銷售點(POS)與合規軟體。

highlight.en: Its all-in-one platform handles sales, menus, inventory, loyalty, and delivery dispatch while keeping dispensaries compliant with local and state regulations.
highlight.zh: 其一站式平台處理銷售、菜單、庫存、會員與外送派單,同時讓藥房符合地方與州級法規。

summary.en: Transcriptic built a robotic cloud lab for on-demand life science research.
summary.zh: Transcriptic 打造了一個機器人雲端實驗室,提供隨需的生命科學研究服務。

highlight.en: Its Common Lab Environment integrated instruments and IoT into one web interface for remote, reproducible experiments; top-ten pharma firms used the platform.
highlight.zh: 其 Common Lab Environment 將儀器與物聯網整合進單一網頁介面,供遠端執行可重現的實驗;前十大製藥公司皆使用該平台。

summary.en: Tara AI helps engineering leaders measure and improve their team's efficiency.
summary.zh: Tara AI 協助工程主管衡量並提升團隊的開發效率。

highlight.en: It uses fine-tuned, secure LLMs on source-control and project data to surface cycle times, benchmarks, and velocity; customers include MongoDB and Clearbit.
highlight.zh: 它運用以原始碼控制與專案資料訓練的微調安全 LLM,呈現週期時間、基準與速度;客戶包括 MongoDB 與 Clearbit。

summary.en: Industrial Microbes designs and builds microbes to make chemicals greener and cheaper.
summary.zh: Industrial Microbes 設計並打造微生物,以更環保、更低成本的方式製造化學品。

highlight.en: It partners with large companies to use new raw materials and recycle waste for chemical production, polymers, agriculture, and space exploration.
highlight.zh: 它與大型企業合作,運用新原料並回收廢料,用於化學品生產、聚合物、農業與太空探索。

summary.en: Final was a credit card that generated multiple card numbers to reduce payment fraud.
summary.zh: Final 是一張信用卡,透過產生多組卡號來降低支付詐騙。

highlight.en: Instead of one 16-digit number, Final issued per-merchant card numbers it managed automatically, so a breach or stolen card never cut off the holder's spending.
highlight.zh: Final 不採用單一 16 位數卡號,而是為每個商家發行並自動管理的卡號,因此外洩或卡片遭竊都不會中斷持卡人消費。

summary.en: Smyte stopped spam, scams, harassment, and fraud on marketplaces and social networks.
summary.zh: Smyte 阻擋市集與社群網路上的垃圾訊息、詐騙、騷擾與盜刷。

highlight.en: It automatically classified a site or app's event data to detect and block bad actors at scale across web and mobile.
highlight.zh: 它自動分類網站或應用程式的事件資料,在網頁與行動端大規模偵測並封鎖惡意行為者。

summary.en: Labdoor is a marketplace where consumers research and buy lab-tested supplements.
summary.zh: Labdoor 是一個讓消費者研究並購買經實驗室檢測補充品的市集。

highlight.en: It buys actual supplement samples, sends them to an FDA-registered lab for chemical analysis, then converts the results into simple purity and potency grades.
highlight.zh: 它實際購買補充品樣本,送往 FDA 註冊的實驗室進行化學分析,再將結果轉化為簡單的純度與效力評級。

summary.en: TeamNote is a mobile productivity app, like Slack for mobile and frontline workforces.
summary.zh: TeamNote 是一款行動生產力應用程式,猶如為行動與第一線員工打造的 Slack。

highlight.en: Spun off from a Hong Kong enterprise app developer, it helps corporations boost mobile workforce productivity; its first customer was Cheung Kong (Holdings).
highlight.zh: 它自一家香港企業應用程式開發商分拆而出,協助企業提升行動員工的生產力;首位客戶為長江實業(集團)。

summary.en: Seed was a mobile-first banking service built for small businesses.
summary.zh: Seed 是一個以行動裝置為核心、專為小型企業打造的銀行服務。

highlight.en: It gave small businesses modern digital tools and customer-support resources for starting, running, and growing a company, all from a mobile banking app.
highlight.zh: 它為小型企業提供現代化的數位工具與客服資源,透過行動銀行應用程式協助創業、營運與成長。

summary.en: Vanhawks made a connected carbon-fibre commuter bike with built-in navigation and safety sensors.
summary.zh: Vanhawks 製造一款互聯的碳纖維通勤自行車,內建導航與安全感測器。

highlight.en: Its Valour bike had GPS, blind-spot sensors, and handlebar turn-by-turn LED navigation, plus an app tracking ride history and suggesting routes.
highlight.zh: 其 Valour 自行車配備 GPS、盲點感測器與車把上的逐向 LED 導航,並搭配可追蹤騎乘紀錄、推薦路線的應用程式。

summary.en: Raven Tech built AI and big-data tech for a next-generation operating system, later acquired.
summary.zh: Raven Tech 為次世代作業系統打造 AI 與大數據技術,後被收購。

highlight.en: Focused on AI, big data, and the next OS, it was the only startup from mainland China in YC's W15 batch and an alumnus of Microsoft Venture Accelerator.
highlight.zh: 它專注於 AI、大數據與次世代作業系統,是 YC W15 梯次中唯一來自中國大陸的新創,也是微軟創投加速器的校友。

summary.en: Nomiku made a connected home sous vide immersion circulator for cooking.
summary.zh: Nomiku 製造一款互聯的家用舒肥(sous vide)恆溫棒。

highlight.en: It invented the home sous vide immersion circulator in 2012, funded by two Kickstarter projects raising over $1.3M, and made it a mainstream kitchen tool.
highlight.zh: 它在 2012 年發明家用舒肥恆溫棒,以兩次募得逾 130 萬美元的 Kickstarter 集資打造,將這項技術變成主流廚房工具。

summary.en: ThinAir was a cloud-based data security platform for teams.
summary.zh: ThinAir 是一個以雲端為基礎、面向團隊的資料安全平台。

highlight.en: Its SaaS gave administrators and employees control over sensitive data in a way meant to boost productivity; it won 2014 DEMO Enterprise's DEMOGod award.
highlight.zh: 其 SaaS 讓管理者與員工掌控敏感資料,且力求提升生產力;曾獲 2014 年 DEMO Enterprise 的 DEMOGod 獎。

summary.en: Direct Match was building the first all-to-all US Treasury trading venue.
summary.zh: Direct Match 致力打造首個全對全(all-to-all)的美國國債交易平台。

highlight.en: The venture-backed startup aimed to open US Treasury trading to all participants directly rather than routing through traditional dealer intermediaries.
highlight.zh: 這家獲創投支持的新創旨在讓所有參與者直接交易美國國債,而非透過傳統交易商中介。

summary.en: Mobydish was a tech-enabled catering service for orders feeding 10 to 1,000 people.
summary.zh: Mobydish 是一項科技驅動的外燴服務,可承接供應 10 至 1,000 人的訂單。

highlight.en: It let anyone place a catering order online in under three minutes, owning the full stack from ordering software to its own trained delivery and setup fleet.
highlight.zh: 它讓任何人在三分鐘內完成線上外燴下單,並掌控從下單軟體到自有受訓外送與佈置車隊的完整環節。

summary.en: Resolve makes software that speeds up construction by finding issues in 3D BIM models.
summary.zh: Resolve 開發軟體,透過在 3D BIM 模型中找出問題來加速營建。

highlight.en: Combining web collaboration, VR reviews, and AI spatial navigation, it has helped deliver over 6GW of data center capacity plus pharma and healthcare projects.
highlight.zh: 它結合網頁協作、VR 審查與 AI 空間導航,已協助交付逾 6GW 的資料中心容量,以及製藥、水處理與醫療等專案。

summary.en: eBrandValue is a BI platform that uses social data to forecast brand sales and market share.
summary.zh: eBrandValue 是一個商業智慧平台,運用社群資料預測品牌銷售與市占率。

highlight.en: Its proprietary algorithm reads consumer behavior from social data to forecast real-time sales, ROI, and market share, with predictions confirmed by Nielsen.
highlight.zh: 其專有演算法從社群資料解讀消費者行為,以預測即時銷售、投資報酬率與市占率,且預測結果獲 Nielsen 驗證。

summary.en: Standard Cyborg made tools for developers to build, test, and deploy computer-vision apps.
summary.zh: Standard Cyborg 開發工具,讓開發者建構、測試並部署電腦視覺應用程式。

highlight.en: It built cloud and edge tools to make computer vision accessible to developers and non-developers, letting them build and improve CV solutions quickly.
highlight.zh: 它打造雲端與邊緣工具,讓開發者與非開發者都能取用電腦視覺,快速建構並改進 CV 解決方案。

summary.en: Tab is a travel platform that lets travelers discover, plan, and book trips directly.
summary.zh: Tab 是一個旅遊平台,讓旅客直接探索、規劃並預訂行程。

highlight.en: Its Guide surfaces recommendations from friends and local experts instead of bland listings, encouraging direct booking for better prices and lower fees.
highlight.zh: 其 Guide 以朋友與在地專家的推薦取代平淡列表,鼓勵直接預訂,帶來更優惠的價格並為商家降低手續費。

summary.en: Pomello was analytics software that measured organizational culture to improve hiring fit.
summary.zh: Pomello 是一款分析軟體,衡量組織文化以提升招募契合度。

highlight.en: Built on 30 years of Stanford organizational-behavior research, it mapped culture team-by-team and integrated with recruiting to find candidates who fit.
highlight.zh: 它建立在史丹佛 30 年的組織行為研究之上,逐隊繪製文化樣貌,並整合招募流程以找出可能蓬勃發展的人選。

summary.en: Shift Labs makes simple, affordable medical devices for diverse care settings.
summary.zh: Shift Labs 製造簡單、平價的醫療器材,適用於多元的照護環境。

highlight.en: Its award-winning DripAssist is a low-cost IV fluid monitor and alarm offering precision monitoring of transfusions at a fraction of an infusion pump's cost.
highlight.zh: 其獲獎產品 DripAssist 是一款低成本的靜脈輸液監測與警報器,以輸液幫浦的一小部分價格提供精準的輸血監測。

summary.en: Dealyze was an in-store digital rewards and referral platform for small businesses.
summary.zh: Dealyze 是一個店內數位獎勵與推薦平台,服務小型企業。

highlight.en: Backed by YC, it gave small retailers customizable rewards, referral programs, and automated marketing tools designed to bring customers back.
highlight.zh: 在 YC 支持下,它為小型零售商提供可客製的獎勵、推薦計畫與自動化行銷工具,力求將每筆交易轉化為回頭客。

summary.en: Quantierra sources investment real estate for developers using data and algorithms.
summary.zh: Quantierra 運用資料與演算法為開發商發掘投資型不動產。

highlight.en: Its database and algorithms assess what can be built on a site, its value, and the probability of selling, earning a 1.5% cut on properties it helps sell.
highlight.zh: 其資料庫與演算法評估地塊可建什麼、價值多少及售出機率,並就成功協助售出的物件收取 1.5% 的佣金。

summary.en: Level Frames brings custom picture framing online for posters, prints, and photos.
summary.zh: Level Frames 將海報、印刷品與照片的客製裱框服務搬到線上。

highlight.en: By moving the whole framing experience online, it makes custom framing more convenient and affordable than a traditional shop, at faster turnaround.
highlight.zh: 它將整個裱框流程移到線上,使客製裱框比傳統裱框店更便利、更實惠,並降低價格、加快交期。

summary.en: Lully built clinically-proven products to help children and families sleep better.
summary.zh: Lully 開發經臨床驗證的產品,協助兒童與家庭睡得更好。

highlight.en: Its Sleep Guardian sits under the mattress and uses precisely-timed vibrations to prevent children's night terrors; it spun out of Stanford Biodesign.
highlight.zh: 其 Sleep Guardian 置於床墊下,以精準計時的振動預防兒童夜驚;該公司自史丹佛 Biodesign Fellowship 分拆而出。

summary.en: Sails Co. offers a full-service web, mobile, and cloud studio plus support for the Sails framework.
summary.zh: Sails Co. 提供全方位的網頁、行動與雲端工作室服務,並支援 Sails 框架。

highlight.en: Founded by the original author and maintainers of the open-source Sails framework, it provides a web and mobile studio plus professional support for its tools.
highlight.zh: 它由開源 Sails 框架的原作者與維護者創立,提供網頁與行動工作室服務,以及其工具的專業支援。

summary.en: Pakible made it easy to design, price, and manufacture custom product packaging.
summary.zh: Pakible 讓設計、報價與製造客製化產品包裝變得簡單。

highlight.en: Using in-house software to automate operations, it served 2,000+ customers including Samsung, Reddit, Soylent, and the Golden State Warriors.
highlight.zh: 它運用自有軟體自動化營運,服務超過 2,000 家客戶,包括三星、Reddit、Soylent 與金州勇士隊。

summary.en: Dabble was a synthetic photo studio for e-commerce powered by CGI and computer vision.
summary.zh: Dabble 是一個面向電商的合成攝影棚,以 CGI 與電腦視覺驅動。

highlight.en: Using hyper-realistic CGI, it scaled and automated product photography to meet the surging demand for retail content during the shift to online shopping.
highlight.zh: 它運用超寫實 CGI,將產品攝影規模化並自動化,以滿足轉向線上購物所激增的零售內容需求。

summary.en: Pretty Instant was a marketplace for professional photography and videography, acquired by Snappr.
summary.zh: Pretty Instant 是一個專業攝影與錄影的媒合市集,後被 Snappr 收購。

highlight.en: It served 3,500+ brands and nonprofits with vetted contractor photographers, handling staffing, editing, and delivery, and also invented a roaming photo-booth.
highlight.zh: 它以經審核的約聘攝影師服務逾 3,500 個品牌與非營利組織,包辦人員調度、後製與交付,並發明了移動式拍照亭。

summary.en: Priime built technology to improve the quality of shared photos.
summary.zh: Priime 開發技術以提升分享照片的品質。

highlight.en: Founded by lifetime photographers who are also YC-alumni developers and designers, it combined photography passion with product skills to improve shared photos.
highlight.zh: 它由身兼 YC 校友開發者與設計師的終身攝影愛好者創立,結合對攝影的熱情與產品能力,提升分享照片的品質。

summary.en: 3dot is a think-tank that develops new-technology ideas, products, and services for partners.
summary.zh: 3dot 是一家智庫公司,為合作夥伴開發運用新技術的點子、產品與服務。

highlight.en: Based in Ljubljana, Slovenia, it brainstorms and builds breakthrough products and services on emerging technologies for partner companies and their customers.
highlight.zh: 它總部位於斯洛維尼亞盧布爾雅那,為合作企業及其客戶構思並打造運用新興技術的突破性產品與服務。

summary.en: 20n used AI to predict biochemistry for industrial biotech and therapeutics.
summary.zh: 20n 運用 AI 預測生物化學,應用於工業生技與療法。

highlight.en: Backed by DARPA, it treated biology as a big-data learning problem, applying machine learning, AI planning, and program synthesis to predict DNA designs.
highlight.zh: 在 DARPA 支持下,它將生物學視為大數據學習問題,運用機器學習、AI 規劃與程式合成來預測 DNA 設計。

summary.en: Bizzy was an automated, omni-channel marketing platform for e-commerce businesses.
summary.zh: Bizzy 是一個為電商打造的自動化全通路行銷平台。

highlight.en: It was the first tool to centralize an e-commerce shop's entire marketing around a single dynamic customer dataset, adapting campaigns as behavior changed.
highlight.zh: 它是首個將電商店家整個行銷組合集中於單一動態客戶資料集的工具,並隨客戶行為變化調整行銷活動。

summary.en: Cribspot was an online platform for finding and leasing off-campus student housing.
summary.zh: Cribspot 是一個尋找並承租校外學生住房的線上平台。

highlight.en: It streamlined the search and leasing of off-campus housing by connecting college students directly with property managers in one platform.
highlight.zh: 它在單一平台上直接串連大學生與物業管理者,簡化校外住房的尋找與承租流程。

summary.en: CyberFend delivered real-time web and mobile security against account takeover and fraud.
summary.zh: CyberFend 提供即時的網頁與行動安全防護,抵禦帳號盜用與詐騙。

highlight.en: Pairing human cognitive science with machine learning, it protected nearly a billion login and payment transactions monthly with near-zero false positives.
highlight.zh: 它結合人類認知科學與機器學習,每月保護近十億筆登入與支付交易,且誤判率近乎為零。

summary.en: Democracy Earth builds open-source software to deploy censorship-resistant democracies online.
summary.zh: Democracy Earth 開發開源軟體,用以部署抗審查的線上民主機制。

highlight.en: Its free software has powered crypto-network governance, activist shadow referendums, and the first Quadratic Voting used by Colorado's legislature.
highlight.zh: 其免費軟體已用於加密網路治理、行動者的影子公投,以及科羅拉多州議會採用的首個二次方投票。

summary.en: The Human Utility matches families needing utility-bill help with donors who pay providers directly.
summary.zh: The Human Utility 將需要水電帳單援助的家庭與直接向供應商付款的捐贈者配對。

highlight.en: Formerly the Detroit Water Project, it splits a bill like a loan syndicate so global donors keep families connected, then uses data to address root causes.
highlight.zh: 它前身為底特律水計畫,以類似聯貸的方式分攤帳單,讓全球捐贈者協助家庭維持供水,並運用資料解決根本問題。

summary.en: SparkGift made it easy to give stocks and index funds as gifts.
summary.zh: SparkGift 讓人能輕鬆將股票與指數基金當作禮物贈送。

highlight.en: Supporting small-dollar gifts and fractional shares, it let people give a $20 investment in Apple or a Vanguard index fund as easily as a retail gift card.
highlight.zh: 它支援小額禮物與零股,讓人能像送零售禮品卡一樣輕鬆贈送 20 美元的蘋果股票或 Vanguard 指數基金。

summary.en: GroupAhead let organizations create their own dedicated mobile apps for member communication.
summary.zh: GroupAhead 讓組織能建立專屬的行動應用程式以進行成員溝通。

highlight.en: Its easy-to-use, single-purpose app focused solely on connecting an organization's members, using push notifications to cut through email and Facebook noise.
highlight.zh: 其易用的單一用途應用程式專注於串連組織成員,並以推播通知穿透電子郵件與 Facebook 的雜訊。

summary.en: WorkLife was a SaaS app that helped teams run more effective, productive meetings.
summary.zh: WorkLife 是一款 SaaS 應用程式,協助團隊開更有效、更有生產力的會議。

highlight.en: Targeting the wasted half of the US's 3 billion annual meetings, it helped teams build good habits: creating agendas, staying on track, and tracking next steps.
highlight.zh: 它針對美國每年 30 億場會議中被浪費的一半,協助團隊養成良好習慣:擬定議程、聚焦進行並追蹤後續事項。

summary.en: Instavest let investors share their trades so others could invest alongside them.
summary.zh: Instavest 讓投資人分享自己的交易,使其他人能跟著一起投資。

highlight.en: Investors listed trades with their rationale, letting others invest alongside, while setting aside about 5% of resulting profits for the original poster.
highlight.zh: 投資人列出交易及其理由,讓他人跟單,並將由此產生利潤的約 5% 分給原始發布者。

summary.en: Kickpay was a platform to finance inventory for e-commerce companies.
summary.zh: Kickpay 是一個為電商公司提供庫存融資的平台。

highlight.en: By leveraging a client's data, it unlocked previously unavailable financing and let companies pay for inventory only after it sells, not months beforehand.
highlight.zh: 它運用客戶資料,開啟過去無法取得的融資,讓公司在庫存售出後才付款,而非提前數月支付。

summary.en: Omniref was a community-powered code reference, like sticky notes for code.
summary.zh: Omniref 是一個社群驅動的程式碼參考工具,猶如程式碼的便利貼。

highlight.en: Maintained by and for the programming community, it let developers find questions, comments, links, and docs on the code libraries they were already using.
highlight.zh: 它由程式設計社群維護並服務該社群,讓開發者能針對自己正在使用的程式碼庫找到問答、評論、連結與文件。

summary.en: Shift Messenger was a real-time messaging tool for retail and restaurant employees.
summary.zh: Shift Messenger 是一款為零售與餐廳員工打造的即時通訊工具。

highlight.en: Used daily by retail employees, the messaging solution aimed to reduce employee turnover and save managers time.
highlight.zh: 這款通訊解決方案供零售員工每日使用,旨在降低員工流動率並為管理者節省時間。

summary.en: Rare Door was an e-commerce platform helping shoppers discover products in nearby stores.
summary.zh: Rare Door 是一個電商平台,協助消費者發掘鄰近店家的商品。

highlight.en: It empowered brick-and-mortar retailers to sell more and engage shoppers by helping users discover and buy great products available in nearby stores.
highlight.zh: 它協助實體零售商提升銷售並吸引顧客,讓使用者得以發掘並購買鄰近店家提供的優質商品。

summary.en: YesGraph recommended exactly who a user should invite to an app to drive growth.
summary.zh: YesGraph 精準推薦使用者該邀請哪些人加入應用程式,以驅動成長。

highlight.en: Using machine learning and social-graph analysis like LinkedIn's 'People You May Know,' it boosted referral and invite flows in apps and websites.
highlight.zh: 它運用機器學習與社交圖譜分析(類似 LinkedIn 的「你可能認識的人」),提升應用程式與網站的推薦與邀請流程成效。

summary.en: Glassjar built software to help flatmates track and manage shared household expenses.
summary.zh: Glassjar 開發軟體,協助室友追蹤並管理共同的家庭開銷。

highlight.en: Its Flatting product gave a dashboard of a flat's account, each person's ledger, and spending summaries; it was founded in 2013 in Wellington, New Zealand.
highlight.zh: 其 Flatting 產品提供合租帳戶、每人帳目與消費摘要的儀表板;公司於 2013 年在紐西蘭威靈頓創立。

summary.en: Nextop was a mobile CDN that optimized the path between apps and their backends.
summary.zh: Nextop 是一個行動 CDN,用以最佳化應用程式與其後端之間的傳輸路徑。

highlight.en: It offered a client-side networking library for iOS and Android plus a proxy network using a custom protocol to optimize delivery, throughput, and battery use.
highlight.zh: 它提供 iOS 與 Android 的客戶端網路函式庫,並搭配採用自訂協定的代理網路,以最佳化傳輸、吞吐量、資料與電池用量。

summary.en: Outbound let marketers create automated email, push, SMS, and voice messages around user actions.
summary.zh: Outbound 讓行銷人員圍繞使用者行為,建立自動化的電子郵件、推播、簡訊與語音訊息。

highlight.en: It organized messages around the actions customers take, letting non-technical marketers trigger automated multi-channel messages and test how well each works.
highlight.zh: 它以客戶採取的行為來組織訊息,讓非技術背景的行銷人員觸發自動化的多通路訊息,並測試每則訊息的成效。

summary.en: Spoil was an app for sending on-demand gifts, gifting for the Snapchat generation.
summary.zh: Spoil 是一款隨需送禮的應用程式,為 Snapchat 世代打造的送禮體驗。

highlight.en: It predicted what would make someone happy and used on-demand logistics to deliver gifts, building a story around the experience to make sending thoughtful.
highlight.zh: 它預測什麼能讓人開心,並運用隨需物流送出禮物,圍繞收禮體驗營造故事,使送禮成為一份貼心的心意。

summary.en: Valor Water Analytics delivered a SaaS platform helping water utilities detect issues and lost revenue.
summary.zh: Valor Water Analytics 提供 SaaS 平台,協助自來水公司偵測問題與營收流失。

highlight.en: It turned complex water-utility data into simple, actionable solutions, helping utilities operate more efficiently as water supplies grow scarcer.
highlight.zh: 它將複雜的自來水公司資料轉化為簡單、可行的解決方案,在水資源日益稀缺之際協助公司更有效率地營運。

summary.en: Wink Health was a digital sleep clinic for diagnosing and treating sleep apnea online.
summary.zh: Wink Health 是一家數位睡眠診所,用於線上診斷與治療睡眠呼吸中止症。

highlight.en: Targeting the roughly 90% of sleep apnea cases that go untreated, it combined a smartphone app that listens for risk with telehealth and home treatments.
highlight.zh: 它針對約 90% 未獲治療的睡眠呼吸中止症案例,結合可偵測風險的手機應用程式、遠距醫療諮詢與到府療程。

summary.en: Bagaveev Corporation designed 3D-printed rockets to launch small satellites to orbit.
summary.zh: Bagaveev Corporation 設計 3D 列印火箭,將小型衛星送入軌道。

highlight.en: Backed by Boost VC and advised by Tim Draper, it built a 3-ton rocket with 3D-printed aerospike engines to deliver 10-12 kg nanosatellites to low Earth orbit.
highlight.zh: 在 Boost VC 支持與 Tim Draper 指導下,它打造一枚配備 3D 列印塞式噴管引擎的 3 噸火箭,可將 10 至 12 公斤奈米衛星送入低地球軌道。

summary.en: Automate Ads built software to programmatically automate, optimize, and unify digital ad campaigns.
summary.zh: Automate Ads 開發軟體,以程式化方式自動化、最佳化並整合數位廣告活動。

highlight.en: Its software set out to automate, optimize, and unify a business's digital advertising campaigns across channels.
highlight.zh: 其軟體致力於跨通路自動化、最佳化並整合企業的數位廣告活動。

summary.en: GiveMeTap sells stainless steel water bottles that fund clean water projects in Africa.
summary.zh: GiveMeTap 販售不鏽鋼水瓶,並以收益資助非洲的潔淨水計畫。

highlight.en: Each bottle funds five years of clean water for someone in Africa; it has built water projects in Namibia, Malawi, and Ghana.
highlight.zh: 每只水瓶可資助非洲一個人五年的潔淨用水;它已在納米比亞、馬拉威與迦納建立水計畫。

summary.en: BuildScience makes operating-system software for managing commercial buildings.
summary.zh: BuildScience 開發用於管理商業建築的作業系統軟體。

highlight.en: Deployed in a 1M sq ft Class A office building, its platform let the owner deliver better tenant service via custom software while cutting operating costs.
highlight.zh: 其平台部署於一棟 100 萬平方英尺的 A 級辦公大樓,讓業主透過客製軟體提供更佳租戶服務,降低成本並提升滿意度。

summary.en: DemocracyOS is an online space for deliberating and voting on political proposals.
summary.zh: DemocracyOS 是一個用於審議及投票表決政治提案的線上空間。

highlight.en: Built for more open, participatory government, the platform aims to stimulate better arguments and lead peers to better rulings on policy.
highlight.zh: 該平台為更開放、更具參與性的治理而打造,旨在激發更好的論辯,引導同儕對政策做出更好的決議。

summary.en: ReSchedule Med helped medical residency programs create and manage their schedules.
summary.zh: ReSchedule Med 協助醫療住院醫師訓練計畫建立並管理排班。

highlight.en: It provided an end-to-end workflow for graduate medical education scheduling, tackling one of the largest logistics pain points in residency programs.
highlight.zh: 它提供端到端的工作流程來管理畢業後醫學教育的排班,解決醫院與住院醫師計畫中最大的後勤痛點之一。

summary.en: Giveffect is all-in-one fundraising, volunteer, and donor management SaaS for nonprofits.
summary.zh: Giveffect 是為非營利組織打造的一站式募款、志工與捐贈者管理 SaaS。

highlight.en: Built exclusively for nonprofits, its platform unifies fundraising, events, online donations, volunteer and donor management, marketing, and CRM in one place.
highlight.zh: 它專為非營利組織打造,將募款、活動、線上捐款、志工與捐贈者管理、行銷及 CRM 整合於單一平台。

summary.en: Rescue Forensics gave law enforcement actionable intelligence to fight human trafficking.
summary.zh: Rescue Forensics 為執法機構提供可行的情報,以打擊人口販運。

highlight.en: It archived massive data from classified ad sites carrying commercial sex ads, giving law enforcement forensic evidence for anti-trafficking investigations.
highlight.zh: 它從刊登商業性交易廣告的分類廣告網站封存大量資料,為執法機構的反販運調查提供數位鑑識證據。

summary.en: Flip is a community-driven marketplace for finding and selling rare sneakers.
summary.zh: Flip 是一個社群驅動的市集,用於尋找並販售稀有球鞋。

highlight.en: Its mobile platform lets members bid on hard-to-find, limited-edition sneakers within 90 minutes from a curated list of quality sellers, in a trusted community.
highlight.zh: 其行動平台讓會員在值得信任的社群中,於 90 分鐘內向精選的優質賣家競標難尋的限量球鞋。

summary.en: Drip Capital builds digital trade finance and B2B commerce infrastructure for small businesses.
summary.zh: Drip Capital 為小型企業打造數位貿易融資與 B2B 商務基礎設施。

highlight.en: Its AI-native underwriting engine has facilitated over $8B in cross-border trade for 11,000 businesses in 60 countries, partnering with Barclays and the IFC.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 原生承保引擎已為 60 國的 11,000 家企業促成逾 80 億美元跨境貿易,並與 Barclays、TD Bank 與 IFC 合作。

summary.en: Teleport is the infrastructure identity company unifying human, machine, and AI identities.
summary.zh: Teleport 是一家基礎設施身分公司,統一人類、機器與 AI 的身分。

highlight.en: It applies strong identity to humans, machines, and AI to speed up engineering, improve resilience against identity-based attacks, and secure AI in production.
highlight.zh: 它將強身分驗證套用於人類、機器與 AI,以加速工程、提升對身分型攻擊的韌性,並在生產環境中保護 AI。

summary.en: Circle Medical delivers modern primary care via video and in-person visits.
summary.zh: Circle Medical 透過視訊與面對面看診提供現代化的初級照護。

highlight.en: Built by physicians, engineers, and designers, its hybrid in-clinic and telemedicine model has grown over 3X year-over-year, expanding across all 50 states.
highlight.zh: 它由醫師、工程師與設計師打造,其診間與遠距醫療並行的混合模式年增逾三倍,並正擴展至全美五十州。

summary.en: PartnerStack is a full-stack platform for managing SaaS partnership programs.
summary.zh: PartnerStack 是一個全方位平台,用於管理 SaaS 合作夥伴計畫。

highlight.en: It supports affiliate, referral, and reseller activity and exposes programs to 450,000+ partners; customers like Intuit see 30%+ more partner-channel revenue.
highlight.zh: 它支援聯盟、推薦與經銷活動,並將計畫曝光給逾 45 萬名合作夥伴;Intuit 等客戶的合作夥伴通路營收提升逾 30%。

summary.en: Fountain is an all-in-one platform that makes high-volume hiring simple.
summary.zh: Fountain 是一個一站式平台,讓大量招募變得簡單。

highlight.en: Candidates apply in minutes from their phone while automated workflows and analytics help enterprises hire over 1.2 million workers a year across 78 countries.
highlight.zh: 求職者可在手機上於數分鐘內完成申請,而自動化流程與分析協助企業每年在 78 個國家招募逾 120 萬名員工。

summary.en: Plate IQ automates accounts payable by digitizing invoices down to the line item.
summary.zh: Plate IQ 將發票數位化至單一明細,實現應付帳款自動化。

highlight.en: It replaces manual entry by assigning GL codes, syncing to accounting software, and adding one-click bill pay and analytics so businesses go paperless.
highlight.zh: 它取代人工輸入,自動指派總帳科目、同步至會計軟體,並加入一鍵付款、庫存與分析,讓企業得以無紙化。

summary.en: Bitmovin powers OTT video providers with encoding and player developer tools.
summary.zh: Bitmovin 以編碼與播放器開發工具為 OTT 影音供應商提供技術支援。

highlight.en: A first mover in online video, it built the first commercial adaptive-streaming HTML5 player and the first containerized encoder with Docker and Kubernetes.
highlight.zh: 作為線上影音的先行者,它打造首個商用自適應串流 HTML5 播放器,以及以 Docker 與 Kubernetes 製作的首個容器化編碼器。

summary.en: Zeplin is an organized workspace for publishing finalized designs for product teams.
summary.zh: Zeplin 是一個有條理的工作空間,供產品團隊發布定稿的設計。

highlight.en: It gives teams a shared space to publish and collaborate on finalized designs and ship products; it serves millions of users at Apple and Microsoft.
highlight.zh: 它提供團隊共享空間以發布定稿設計、協作並交付產品;服務蘋果、Salesforce 與微軟的數百萬名使用者。

summary.en: GiveCampus is a fundraising platform for non-profit educational institutions.
summary.zh: GiveCampus 是一個為非營利教育機構打造的募款平台。

highlight.en: Trusted by 1,500+ colleges, universities, and K-12 schools, it has facilitated over $7 billion in charitable giving since 2015 to advance education access.
highlight.zh: 它獲超過 1,500 所大專院校與 K-12 學校信賴,自 2015 年以來已促成逾 70 億美元慈善捐助,以提升教育可近性。

summary.en: RedCarpetUp issues credit cards to new-to-credit Indians that banks overlook.
summary.zh: RedCarpetUp 為銀行所忽視、首次接觸信貸的印度人發行信用卡。

highlight.en: In a market where under 40 million of 800 million bank-account holders have credit cards, it builds a full-stack SDK to be 'India's Capital One.'
highlight.zh: 在 8 億銀行帳戶持有人中不到 4,000 萬人擁有信用卡的市場裡,它打造全端 SDK,志在成為「印度的 Capital One」。

summary.en: TetraScience runs an R&D data cloud built specifically for life sciences.
summary.zh: TetraScience 經營一個專為生命科學打造的研發資料雲。

highlight.en: Its Tetra Data Platform gives pharma and biotech scientists centralized, harmonized, actionable scientific data to accelerate digital lab transformation.
highlight.zh: 其 Tetra Data Platform 為製藥與生技科學家提供集中化、標準化且可行動的科學資料,以加速數位實驗室轉型。

summary.en: Eight Sleep is a sleep fitness company making thermoregulated, data-driven sleep products.
summary.zh: Eight Sleep 是一家睡眠健身公司,製造可調溫、資料驅動的睡眠產品。

highlight.en: Founded in 2014, it uses thermoregulation and data to restore peak energy; it was named to Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies and TIME's Best Inventions.
highlight.zh: 它成立於 2014 年,運用溫度調節與資料幫助使用者恢復巔峰精力;曾入選 Fast Company 最具創新力公司與 TIME 年度最佳發明。

summary.en: PickTrace provides workforce and harvest management software for large-scale farms.
summary.zh: PickTrace 為大規模農場提供勞動力與採收管理軟體。

highlight.en: Founded by brothers Austin and Harrison Steed, its software gives growers insight into operations to make farms more efficient, compliant, and profitable.
highlight.zh: 它由 Austin 與 Harrison Steed 兄弟創立,其軟體讓種植者洞悉營運,使農場更有效率、合規且具獲利能力。

summary.en: Tesorio is a cash flow performance platform that helps finance teams manage and predict cash.
summary.zh: Tesorio 是一個現金流績效平台,協助財務團隊管理並預測現金。

highlight.en: Billed as the first cash flow performance platform, it uses AI to help CFOs and finance teams better manage, predict, and collect cash to boost profits.
highlight.zh: 它號稱首個現金流績效平台,運用 AI 協助財務長與財務團隊更好地管理、預測及收回現金,以提升獲利。

summary.en: Call9 brought emergency medicine and palliative care to patients' bedsides in nursing facilities.
summary.zh: Call9 將急診醫療與安寧照護帶到護理機構患者的床邊。

highlight.en: Onsite specialists let offsite ER physicians see and treat patients via its platform, cutting average wait to see an EM physician from 64 minutes to moments.
highlight.zh: 駐點專員讓場外急診醫師能透過其平台看診與治療,將見到急診醫師的平均等候時間從 64 分鐘縮短至數分鐘內。

summary.en: Maderight was a one-stop shop for fashion sourcing, manufacturing, and logistics.
summary.zh: Maderight 是時尚採購、製造與物流的一站式服務商。

highlight.en: It managed brands' entire supply chains through a curated consortium of factories vetted for ethical practices, quality, and timely delivery.
highlight.zh: 它透過一個經審核確保道德實踐、品質與準時交付的精選工廠聯盟,管理品牌的整條供應鏈。

summary.en: Lugg is an on-demand app to get furniture and large items moved at the push of a button.
summary.zh: Lugg 是一款隨需應用程式,只需按一個鍵就能搬運家具與大型物品。

highlight.en: It connects users to movers and a truck on demand, making it simple to get new furniture home, deliver marketplace purchases, or move into a new apartment.
highlight.zh: 它隨需為使用者媒合搬運工與貨車,讓人輕鬆把新家具運回家、配送二手交易商品,或搬進新公寓。

summary.en: Jopwell advances career opportunities for Black, Latinx, and Native American professionals.
summary.zh: Jopwell 為黑人、拉丁裔與美洲原住民專業人士拓展職涯機會。

highlight.en: It aims to measurably increase these communities' representation in the workforce by helping companies with recruitment, marketing, and retention.
highlight.zh: 它協助企業針對有色族群進行招募、行銷與留任,旨在切實提升這些社群在職場中的代表性。

summary.en: Scope AR provides enterprise augmented-reality tools for training and remote support.
summary.zh: Scope AR 提供企業級擴增實境工具,用於訓練與遠端支援。

highlight.en: Its Remote AR lets an expert see and annotate a field technician's view, while WorkLink lets clients build their own AR guides for assembly and repair.
highlight.zh: 其 Remote AR 讓專家能看見並標註現場技師的視野,而 WorkLink 則讓客戶自建用於組裝與維修的 AR 指南。
